subject: [RFC PATCH v2 5/7] mm, swap: add debugfs counters for vswap

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch adds two debugfs counters to track the usage of virtual swap slots in Linux. The 'used' counter keeps track of the number of virtual swap slots currently allocated, while the 'alloc_reject' counter counts the cumulative number of failed vswap allocations. This allows developers and administrators to monitor the performance and behavior of virtual swap on their system.
